hero.sub: We rebuild the brands and marketing presence of local businesses that do great work but look stuck in the past — so your image finally matches your quality.

problem.heading: Your customers Google you before they call.
problem.body: A logo from 2009, a website that looks like a template, and no consistent visual identity tell potential customers one thing: this business hasn't kept up. In today's market, perception is everything — and an outdated brand costs you real jobs, every week.

services.heading: We fix the leaks in your brand.

cards.title: Brand Strategy & Identity
cards.description: A consistent, modern brand identity changes how customers see you before you ever speak to them. We build the visual identity, messaging, and positioning that makes your business look like it means business.

cards.title: Commercial Photography & Video
cards.description: A strong brand needs imagery that matches it. We handle commercial photography and video in-house — real shots of your business, your team, and your work, that give your marketing something worth showing off.

cards.title: Web & Digital Presence
cards.description: Your brand needs somewhere to live. We build clean, fast websites that present your business the way it deserves — consistent with your brand and easy to find.

steps.title: 1. The Audit
steps.body: We look at your current brand, marketing, and digital presence — and give you an honest picture of where you're losing customers and why.

steps.title: 2. The Build
steps.body: We execute — new brand identity, fresh marketing assets, and supporting photography or web work. No 8-week timelines, no mystery.

steps.title: 3. The Launch
steps.body: You go to market looking like the business you actually are — with a brand and presence that reflects the quality of your real work.

authority.heading:
Straightforward.
And I actually get this stuff.
authority.body: Cove Digital is run by Ben Scholl — a strategist, photographer, and marketer with a background in brand identity, an Adobe Digital Marketing certificate, and a photography and video business that's competed and won at the national level. I'm not a big firm, and I won't pretend to be. What I am is someone who understands branding deeply, works directly with every client, and treats your project like it matters — because to me, it does.

contact.heading: Ready to command attention?
contact.intro: Stop settling for "good enough." Send us your project details and we'll respond within 24 hours.
